title: Add Pregnant Women Module

requirements.text: Add a 'Pregnant Women' data model to the backend with fields: name, age, husband name, address, phone number, last menstrual period (LMP) date, expected delivery date (EDD), gestational age (weeks), weight, hemoglobin level, blood pressure, trimester, risk level (normal/moderate/high), and visit history (array of dated records with weight, BP, hemoglobin, and notes).
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores and retrieves pregnant woman records with all specified fields
Visit history entries can be added to an existing record
Records can be queried by risk level and trimester

requirements.text: Add a 'Pregnant Women' tab to the main navigation (both the desktop tab bar in Layout.tsx and the mobile BottomNavigation.tsx), alongside the existing Dashboard, Growth, Attendance, and Parent tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Pregnant Women' tab appears in both desktop header navigation and mobile bottom navigation
Tapping/clicking the tab navigates to the Pregnant Women page
Active state styling matches the existing tab styles

requirements.text: Create a PregnantWomenPage that displays: (1) a summary section showing total registered pregnant women, count by trimester (1st/2nd/3rd), and count by risk level (normal/moderate/high); (2) a searchable, filterable list of registered pregnant women cards; (3) a form to register a new pregnant woman or record a new visit.
acceptanceCriteria: Summary cards display total count and breakdown by trimester and risk level
List shows all registered pregnant women with key details (name, EDD, trimester, risk level)
User can filter the list by trimester or risk level
Registration form accepts all required fields and submits to the backend
New visit recording form allows updating weight, BP, and hemoglobin for an existing record

requirements.text: Create a PregnantWomanCard component that displays: woman's name, age, gestational age in weeks, trimester badge, risk level badge (color-coded: green for normal, yellow for moderate, red for high), EDD, last visit date, and an expand toggle to show visit history and latest vitals (weight, BP, hemoglobin).
acceptanceCriteria: Card shows name, gestational age, trimester, risk level badge, and EDD in collapsed state
Risk level badge is color-coded using the existing status color utilities
Expanded state shows visit history and latest vitals
Visual style is consistent with ChildRecordCard

requirements.text: Add dummy/seed data for at least 5 pregnant women across different trimesters and risk levels in a new utility file (frontend/src/utils/pregnantWomenData.ts), following the same pattern as dummyData.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 5 pregnant woman records are defined with varied trimesters and risk levels
Each record includes at least 2 visit history entries
TypeScript types are defined for PregnantWoman and PregnantWomanVisit

requirements.text: Add gestational age calculation and trimester classification utilities in frontend/src/utils/gestationalCalculations.ts: given an LMP date, calculate gestational age in weeks, determine trimester (1st: 1–13 weeks, 2nd: 14–26 weeks, 3rd: 27+ weeks), and compute EDD (LMP + 280 days).
acceptanceCriteria: Gestational age in weeks is correctly computed from LMP date
Trimester is correctly classified based on gestational age
EDD is correctly calculated as LMP + 280 days

constraints: Follow the existing visual design system (OKLCH color tokens, Tailwind classes, component patterns)
New navigation tab must not break existing tab routing in App.tsx
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
nonGoals: Real SMS or notification sending to pregnant women
Integration with external health databases or government APIs
Antenatal care scheduling or appointment booking
